title: Burton Mcintyre
compiled_truth: Burton Mcintyre is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-17 to 2001-11-30), Burton Mcintyre sent 4 and received 210 emails, totalling 214 interactions.
